summary.lv: Intrum meklē Local IT & Office Support speciālistu, kas darbosies kā pirmā kontaktpersona darbiniekiem uz vietas, reģistrēs tiketus un sniegs IT atbalstu.
summary.en: Intrum is hiring a Local IT & Office Support Specialist to act as the on-site first point of contact, register tickets on behalf of end users and provide IT support.
